queries.question: Show all pop songs and only those hip hop songs which were performed at Madison Square Garden.
queries.sql:
SELECT Songs.title 
FROM Music_Genres JOIN Songs ON Music_Genres.id = Songs.music_genre_id JOIN Concerts ON Songs.concert_id = Concerts.id
WHERE Music_Genres.name = "Pop Song" OR Music_Genres.name = "Hip Hop Song" AND Concerts.venue = "Madison Square Garden"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?music_genres a :Music_Genre .
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?songs p:hasMusic_Genres ?music_genres .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?songs p:hasConcerts ?concerts .
  ?songs p:title ?title .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?concerts p:venue ?venue_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Pop Song" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Hip Hop Song" && STR(?venue_w) = "Madison Square Garden")))
}

queries.question: Show pop songs and hip hop songs performed at Madison Square Garden.
queries.sql:
SELECT Songs.title 
FROM Music_Genres JOIN Songs ON Music_Genres.id = Songs.music_genre_id JOIN Concerts ON Songs.concert_id = Concerts.id
WHERE (Music_Genres.name = "Pop Song" OR Music_Genres.name = "Hip Hop Song") AND Concerts.venue = "Madison Square Garden"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?music_genres a :Music_Genre .
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?songs p:hasMusic_Genres ?music_genres .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?songs p:hasConcerts ?concerts .
  ?songs p:title ?title .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?concerts p:venue ?venue_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Pop Song" || STR(?name_w2) = "Hip Hop Song")) && STR(?venue_w) = "Madison Square Garden"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show pop songs and hip hop songs performed at Madison Square Garden.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?music_genres a :Music_Genre .
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?songs p:hasMusic_Genres ?music_genres .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?songs p:hasConcerts ?concerts .
  ?songs p:title ?title .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?concerts p:venue ?venue_w .
  FILTER((STR(?name_w) = "Pop Song" || (STR(?name_w2) = "Hip Hop Song" && STR(?venue_w) = "Madison Square Garden")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?music_genres a :Music_Genre .
  ?songs a :Song .
  ?songs p:hasMusic_Genres ?music_genres .
  ?concerts a :Concert .
  ?songs p:hasConcerts ?concerts .
  ?songs p:title ?title .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w .
  ?music_genres p:name ?name_w2 .
  ?concerts p:venue ?venue_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?name_w) = "Pop Song" || STR(?name_w2) = "Hip Hop Song")) && STR(?venue_w) = "Madison Square Garden"))
} }
}
